Functions to add and remove alarms using time, ID, type, kind, and UUID.

# Purpose
This C header file declares two functions related to alarm management. The [`alarm_pin_add`](<#alarm_pin_add>) function is used to add an alarm with specified parameters such as `alarm_time`, `id`, `type`, `kind`, and outputs a `Uuid` through the `uuid_out` pointer. The [`alarm_pin_remove`](<#alarm_pin_remove>) function removes an alarm using its `Uuid`. The file includes dependencies on `uuid.h` and `alarm.h`, which likely define the `Uuid`, `AlarmId`, `AlarmType`, and `AlarmKind` types used in the function signatures. The `#pragma once` directive ensures the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
# Imports and Dependencies

- `util/uuid.h`
- `services/normal/alarms/alarm.h`
